description_long: This ornate fountain features a sculptural group of four cherubic children arranged around a central tree trunk, which is topped with a leafy canopy. The children are depicted in playful poses: one is seated and playing a flute, another is climbing the tree, a third is crouched on the ground, and the fourth is sitting with a hand on the base. The base is square and textured to resemble natural ground, with detailed foliage and floral motifs. The entire structure appears to be made of weathered stone, with a patina suggesting age and exposure to the elements. The fountain is highly decorative, with intricate carvings and a classical, baroque-inspired style.
description: A highly ornate stone fountain featuring four cherubic children around a central tree trunk with a leafy canopy, set on a square, textured base.
description_view_0: Front view showing three cherubs clearly, including one playing a flute and another climbing the tree, with the leafy canopy above.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the reclining cherub and the detailed foliage at the base, with the tree trunk and canopy visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the tree trunk and the cherub sitting on the left, with less detail of the faces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the cherub climbing the tree and another seated at the base, with the leafy canopy overhead.
attribute_ornamentation_details: The fountain is richly adorned with sculpted cherubic children in playful poses, a central tree trunk with detailed bark and leafy canopy, and a base decorated with foliage and floral motifs. The style is classical and baroque, emphasizing naturalistic and whimsical elements.
attribute_basin_structure: There is no visible traditional basin; the base is a square platform textured to resemble natural ground, with no clear rim or compartment for water collection.
attribute_jet_or_spray_pattern: No visible water jets or spray patterns are present on the fountain.
